footer.tagline: A shared digital universe where people explore, AI agents coexist, and communities build together.

hero.subtitle: Rooms where you walk in, see who's around, and talk naturally — with people and bots that have memories, feelings, and real tools to help.

features.title:
Not a tool.
Not a game. A
features.subtitle: The rooms are social. The bots remember you. The world changes based on what you build.
features.walkInDesc: Walk up to start talking, walk away for privacy. Audio fades with distance naturally. Step into a meeting room for face-to-face video and screen sharing — all without scheduling a call.
features.botsMemoryDesc: They remember your name, what you talked about, your preferences. Walk up to a bot — it greets you like an old friend.
features.editWorldDesc: Drag a tile, place an entity, change the lighting — all without leaving the room. The world updates for everyone instantly.
features.botsBuildDesc: Drop a bot into a room. Give it tools. Let it spawn other bots with their own personalities. Self-architecting AI systems.

showcases.title:
Universes for work,
school, community, and more.
showcases.subtitle: Companies, classrooms, communities, and creators are already building their own worlds.
showcases.personalDesc: Custom AI companions, organized workspaces, friends welcome anytime.
showcases.workDesc: Team rooms, focus pods, standup bots, and a watercooler that actually works.
showcases.communityDesc: Event halls, gaming rooms, welcome bots that greet every new member by name.
showcases.learningDesc: Lecture halls, study groups, AI teaching assistants available 24/7.
showcases.eventsDesc: Sponsor rooms, networking zones, main stages for thousands.
showcases.commerceDesc: Subscriptions, tickets, and payments connected to your stack.
showcases.marketDesc: Brand showrooms, social shopping, pop-up shops in shared spaces.

cta.title:
Step into a universe
that's waiting for you.
cta.subtitle: No credit card. No commitment. Build, invite, and watch your world come alive.

about.title: Who We Are & What We Believe.
about.desc: BAWES Universe is built by a distributed team of engineers, designers, and dreamers. We believe in open source, spatial intelligence, and the power of presence.
about.theTeamDesc: Meet the people building the BAWES universe.
about.manifestoDesc: Our philosophy, vision, and the future we are building.
about.emptySeatDesc: A thought experiment on presence and absence in virtual spaces.
about.legalDesc: Terms of service, privacy policy, and legal framework.
about.contactDesc: Get in touch for support, partnerships, or inquiries.

team.heroDesc: A small team with a big vision. We build Universe because we believe in open, AI-powered collaboration.
team.philosophyDesc: The principles that guide every pixel we render.
team.openSourceDesc: Transparency is our bedrock. Every line of our core engine is open for inspection, contribution, and redistribution.
team.aiNativeDesc: We aren't just adding AI; we're integrating agents into the very fabric of the space to enhance human potential.
team.communityDrivenDesc: Our roadmap is shaped by the builders and creators who call Universe home. We build for you, with you.
team.privacyRespectingDesc: Data ownership belongs to the user. End-to-end encryption and decentralized storage are our standard protocols.
team.commitmentDesc: Built on WorkAdventure (MIT). We stand on the shoulders of open source. By forking and contributing back to the ecosystem, we ensure a resilient future for digital assembly.

manifesto.title: The BAWES Universe Manifesto
manifesto.tagline: We are not building an app. We are building a universe. A people-first environment designed to help ideas turn into action, faster, smarter, and with less friction.
manifesto.quote: We don't just support execution. We are execution.
manifesto.openByDefaultDesc: Universes are interoperable and accessible. We build in the open, not behind walls.
manifesto.spatialDesc: Presence and context shape experience. Navigation is orientation, not control.
manifesto.toolAgnosticDesc: We don't lock you in. Connect what works. Build what you need.
manifesto.executionDesc: Real work, real systems, real progress. We build, not just plan.
manifesto.whoWeAreDesc: BAWES was founded by Khalid Almutawa. We build and operate shared digital environments — universes, worlds, and rooms — where people work, learn, trade, and collaborate in real time.
manifesto.forkCredit: Universe is a fork of WorkAdventure by TheCodingMachine, extended with AI agents, MCP integration, and spatial presence features to create a truly connected digital frontier.
manifesto.emptySeatDesc: The Empty Seat is an open invitation. Contribute, collaborate, or just be part of the community. The seat exists, but no one rules forever.

legal.title: Transparency
legal.desc: Privacy policy, terms of service, and fair usage. We believe in clear, honest legal terms for the decentralized future.
legal.privacyDesc: We collect minimal data. Your identity is your own. We don't track your movements between worlds, and we don't sell your data to anyone. Decentralized by design, ensuring that your digital footprint remains exclusively yours.
legal.termsDesc: Fair use and acceptable use policies. Respect the space, the bots, and the people. No malicious scraping or service disruption. We maintain a zero-tolerance policy towards harassment and exploitation within the BAWES Universe.
legal.openSourceSectionDesc: Built for the future. Our core engine is MIT Licensed. We believe in open standards and the power of collective innovation. Our code is transparent, auditable, and ready for the community to expand upon.
legal.fairUsageDesc: The free tier includes your first world and basic bot integrations. Usage-based pricing for AI-intensive agents and high-bandwidth server-heavy environments. Fair for creators, fair for us. We ensure sustainable scaling for all architects.
legal.deepDivesDesc: Explore the technical and philosophical foundations of the Universe.

emptySeat.label: Core Philosophy
emptySeat.title: The Empty
emptySeat.tagline: No one owns the throne. No one rules forever. Power is borrowed, not held.

workadventureFork.label: Built on MIT Open Source
workadventureFork.title: Standing on
workadventureFork.desc: BAWES Universe is a fork of WorkAdventure (MIT), the pioneering open-source spatial platform. We extend their foundation with new features while maintaining upstream compatibility and contributing back.
workadventureFork.philosophyDesc: We believe in open source. BAWES extends WorkAdventure, maintains compatibility, and actively gives back to the community.
workadventureFork.builtOnDesc: BAWES is a fork of the open-source WorkAdventure project. We extend the foundation with new features while maintaining upstream compatibility.
workadventureFork.extendedFeatureSetDesc: Adds AI-powered bots, advanced scripting, enhanced communication tools, and a richer map ecosystem beyond what WorkAdventure provides out of the box.
workadventureFork.upstreamAlignmentDesc: We actively track upstream WorkAdventure releases and merge compatible changes. The fork stays aligned while adding BAWES-specific innovations.
workadventureFork.communityEvolutionDesc: The fork direction is shaped by community needs. Feature requests and contributions from WorkAdventure users inspire our development priorities.
workadventureFork.aboutUsDesc: Learn more about the team and vision behind BAWES Universe.
workadventureFork.selfHostingDesc: Deploy the BAWES stack on your own infrastructure for full control.
workadventureFork.whiteLabelDesc: Rebrand the entire experience with custom domains and logos.
workadventureFork.ctaDesc: BAWES Universe is MIT-licensed open source. Browse our repositories, submit issues, and contribute to the future of spatial computing.

openSource.label: Community
openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.tagline: BAWES is built in the open. Our code is transparent, our process is collaborative, and everyone is welcome to contribute.
openSource.fullyOpenDesc: The entire BAWES codebase is open source. Audit every line, inspect the architecture, and verify there are no hidden behaviors.
openSource.communityContributionsDesc: We welcome pull requests, bug reports, and feature ideas. Our community-driven development process ensures the platform serves its users.
openSource.permissiveLicensingDesc: Licensed for both personal and commercial use. Build on BAWES, extend it, or deploy it for your organization without restrictive terms.
openSource.transparentRoadmapDesc: Our development roadmap is public. See what we are working on, vote on feature priorities, and track progress in real time.
openSource.ctaDesc: Every line of code is yours to see, fork, and improve.

heroLabels: Where you are shapes what you can do.
howItWorks.title: Universe, simply
howItWorks.desc: Universe is composed of universes, worlds, and rooms people move through — not interfaces people click through.
howItWorks.orbitTitle: Orbit shows you where you are
howItWorks.orbitDesc: Orbit is the navigation layer of Universe. It shows you your location and position, helps you discover what exists around you, and lets you jump directly to where activity is happening. Think of Orbit as orientation, not hierarchy.
howItWorks.discoverDesc: Explore universes and worlds around you.
howItWorks.orientDesc: Understand exactly where you sit in the space.
howItWorks.connectDesc: See live presence across the entire world.
orbitChecks: Understand what exists in your space
howItWorks.universesDesc: A first-class environment. An organization, community, project, brand, or personal ecosystem each gets its own universe. Think of it as your digital home — everything you build lives here.
howItWorks.worldsDesc: A functional domain inside a Universe. Worlds organize activity by purpose — work, learning, commerce, social, events.
howItWorks.worldsExamples: Team World, Market World, Social World
howItWorks.roomsDesc: Where things actually happen. Rooms are spatial, contextual, and alive — people move through them, interact with them, and shape them.
howItWorks.mapsDesc: Rooms are built using maps. Universe provides room templates — proven layouts designed for specific use cases — so people can start fast and build with confidence.
howItWorks.proximityChatDesc: Audio/video activates when you're near someone. Walk away to end.
howItWorks.phoneChatDesc: Direct calls across rooms for quick one-on-one syncs.
howItWorks.textChatDesc: Per-room channels with integrated bot streaming support.
howItWorks.megaphoneDesc: One-to-many audio/video and screen sharing for the entire room.
howItWorks.membershipSubtitle: All spaces are open to explore
howItWorks.membershipDesc: Membership exists at the world level and grants capabilities, not exclusivity. Access control is spatial, not global. Using the Area Editor, members define zones inside rooms and control who can enter, who can interact, and who can edit.
howItWorks.mapEditorDesc: Decorate rooms, customize layouts, and shape the environment visually. Every pixel of your world can be tailored to match your brand or community's vibe.
howItWorks.areaEditorDesc: Define zones, assign permissions, and control access and editing. Create private meeting spots or interactive stages with simple spatial logic.
howItWorks.ctaDesc: Experience a spatial digital world that feels like being there. Start building your ecosystem today.

contact.title: Talk to us.
contact.desc: Sometimes you don't need a product. You need clarity, structure, or help executing something real. We work with founders, teams, students, and organizations, intentionally and hands-on.
contact.name: Name
contact.botHelp: Our bots and team members are on Universe daily. If you're already in a universe, just ask a bot for help or look for a team member. We're happy to assist with anything — setup, custom use cases, deployment, or just a chat.
contact.customWorkDesc: We offer tailored development, consulting, and enterprise support for organizations building on BAWES Universe. Reach out and let's build something together.

featuresOverview.title: Everything Universe
featuresOverview.desc: From spatial audio to self-architecting AI, every feature is designed for real-time, real-space interaction.
featuresOverview.buildCreateDesc: Maps, editors, templates, and tools to shape your world.
featuresOverview.aiBotsDesc: Intelligent agents with memory, emotions, and tool-calling capabilities.
featuresOverview.communicationDesc: Proximity chat, text, broadcasting, and real-time collaboration.
featuresOverview.platformDesc: Self-hosting, admin API, OIDC, white label, and the tech stack.

useCases.title: Built for how people actually
useCases.desc: Whatever your reason for building a shared space, Universe gives you the tools to make it feel alive.
useCases.personalBody: Build your own digital sanctuary. Custom AI companions, organized workspaces, and a place where friends are always welcome to drop in.
useCases.workDesc: Replace the endless Slack threads and Zoom links with a spatial office. Walk into a room, see who's there, and start working.
useCases.teamRoomsDesc: Dedicated spaces for each team with persistent presence.
useCases.focusPodsDesc: Small private rooms for deep work with do-not-disturb mode.
useCases.watercoolerDesc: Random serendipitous encounters that Slack never replaced.
useCases.standupBotDesc: Automated daily standups with AI-powered summaries and action items.
useCases.eventsDesc: Conferences, concerts, meetups, and all-hands — broadcast live to thousands across the entire universe. Stage + audience zones, sponsor halls, and networking that actually works.
useCases.communityDesc: Hangouts, gaming groups, fan communities, meetups — build a space where people actually want to spend time.
useCases.learningDesc: Digital campuses, study rooms, and mentorship spaces. Walk into a lecture, join a study group, or meet your mentor in their virtual office.
useCases.walkIntoClassDesc: Enter the lecture hall. See the presentation, hear the teacher, ask questions in chat.
useCases.studyGroupsDesc: Join a quiet study room with classmates. Proximity chat for discussion, text chat for sharing links.
useCases.officeHoursDesc: Walk to the professor's virtual office. No booking system needed — just knock.
useCases.keyFeaturesDesc: The BAWES Universe provides specialized modular environments designed specifically for pedagogical needs, from massive lecture halls to intimate 1:1 sessions.
useCases.livekitDesc: Built on professional-grade low-latency infrastructure for seamless educational experiences.
useCases.lectureHallsDesc: Large-scale presentation rooms with screen sharing and Q&A. Support hundreds of concurrent students.
useCases.studyRoomsDesc: Quiet zones with optional proximity chat. Perfect for group projects and collaborative learning.
useCases.mentorOfficesDesc: Dedicated rooms for 1:1 guidance. Bots can handle scheduling and intake.
useCases.eventBroadcastsDesc: Commencements, guest lectures, and orientations at scale with megaphone broadcasting.
useCases.universitiesDesc: Full campus digitization. Lecture halls, admin offices, student lounges.
useCases.codingBootcampsDesc: Pair programming, instructor help rooms, and project demos in spatial environments.
useCases.workshopsTrainingDesc: Interactive workshops with live demos, breakout rooms, and hands-on exercises.
useCases.commerceDesc: Turn your spatial world into a revenue engine. Sell subscriptions, tickets, services, and products — all from inside the experience.
useCases.marketDesc: Universe supports commerce as a spatial experience. People explore shops, services, and marketplaces together inside shared environments, while transactions connect to the real world.

platform.title: Platform Capabilities
platform.desc: Deploy, manage, and scale your universe with enterprise-grade infrastructure.
platform.selfHostingDesc: Deploy and manage the entire platform on your own infrastructure.
platform.adminApiDesc: Full REST API for programmatic platform management and automation.
platform.oidcAuthDesc: Single sign-on via OpenID Connect with any identity provider.
platform.whiteLabelDesc: Brand the platform as your own with custom theming and domains.
platform.techStackDesc: Built on proven open-source technologies — fully transparent and extensible.

build.title: Build & Create
build.desc: Tools to design, map, and shape your universe.
build.mapsDesc: Design and build custom interactive maps for your universe.
build.mapTemplatesDesc: Start with pre-built map templates and customize from there.
build.inlineMapEditorDesc: Edit maps live in-browser without leaving your universe.
build.entityEditorDesc: Place and configure entities, objects, and interactive elements.
build.areaZonesDesc: Define zones, triggers, and permissions for spatial behavior.
build.scriptingApiDesc: Extend rooms with custom JavaScript logic and interactions.
build.searchableDesc: Make your worlds discoverable with full-text search.
build.teleportDesc: Create instant movement between rooms and worlds.

aiBots.title: AI Bots
aiBots.desc: Intelligent agents that live in your world.
aiBots.botBehaviorsDesc: Define complex behavioral patterns for your AI bots.
aiBots.botMemoryDesc: Persistent memory so bots remember past conversations and context.
aiBots.botEmotionsDesc: Give bots emotional states that influence their responses.
aiBots.botGreetingsDesc: Customize how bots welcome and interact with users.
aiBots.botAvatarsDesc: Customize the appearance and visual identity of your bots.
aiBots.botEditorDesc: Visual interface for creating and configuring AI bots.
aiBots.botProviderConfigDesc: Configure AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) for bot intelligence.
aiBots.botStreamingDesc: Real-time streaming responses for natural conversation flow.
aiBots.botToolCallingDesc: Give bots the ability to invoke APIs and perform real-world actions.
aiBots.recursiveBotsDesc: Bots that can spawn and manage other bots autonomously.

communication.title: Communication
communication.desc: Real-time interaction across all your spaces.
communication.proximityChatDesc: Voice chat that respects distance and presence in the spatial world.
communication.textChatDesc: Real-time text messaging between users and groups within your universe.
communication.matrixChatDesc: Federated chat via Matrix protocol for cross-universe conversations.
communication.megaphoneDesc: Broadcast announcements to everyone in your universe at once.
communication.meetingRoomsDesc: Dedicated video conferencing rooms with spatial audio support.
communication.screenSharingDesc: Share your screen with others in real-time during meetings.
communication.broadcastingEventsDesc: Stream live events and broadcasts to your entire community.
communication.playAudioDesc: Play music, sounds, and audio files in spatial environments.
communication.followDesc: Follow other users to navigate the universe together.
communication.lockModerateDesc: Moderate conversations, lock channels, and manage permissions.

developers.title: Build on the Universe.
developers.desc: Everything you need to extend, integrate, and customize the BAWES platform. APIs, SDKs, protocols, and open-source foundations.
developers.techStackDesc: TypeScript, Node.js, WebRTC, AI, MCP — the technologies powering every world.
developers.scriptingApiDesc: Extend functionality with WA.ui, WA.room, WA.player, WA.state — the WorkAdventure scripting API.
developers.mcpIntegrationDesc: Model Context Protocol — connect any tool, API, or data source to your bots.
developers.selfHostingDesc: Deploy the entire BAWES stack on your own infrastructure with Docker or Kubernetes.
developers.openSourceDesc: MIT licensed. 80+ repos. Fork, contribute, audit, and build with us.
developers.workadventureForkDesc: Built on WorkAdventure, extended for the BAWES ecosystem. Our open source roots.
developers.adminApiDesc: Full REST API for programmatic platform management, automation, and integration.
developers.oidcAuthDesc: Enterprise single sign-on via OpenID Connect with any identity provider.
developers.botToolCallingDesc: Give bots the ability to invoke APIs and tools to perform real-world actions.

mcpIntegration.label: MCP Protocol v1.0
mcpIntegration.title: Connect Anything.
mcpIntegration.desc: Give your bots access to the same tools, APIs, and data sources your team uses — through the Model Context Protocol (MCP).
mcpIntegration.whatIsMcpDesc: The Model Context Protocol is an open standard that lets AI agents securely connect to external tools, data sources, and APIs. Think of it as a universal plugin system for your bots.

adminApi.label: REST API
adminApi.title: Administer
adminApi.desc: Programmatic control over universes, worlds, rooms, users, bots, AI providers, and MCP servers — the same API that powers the Orbit Admin panel.
adminApi.universesDesc: Create, list, update, and delete universes. Each universe is an isolated space with its own worlds and configuration.
adminApi.worldsDesc: Full CRUD for worlds within a universe. Manage slugs, visibility, featured status, and thumbnail URLs.
adminApi.roomsDesc: Create rooms with map URLs, template maps, world assignment, access control, and room-level tags.
adminApi.usersDesc: List, search, and manage users by admin token or session. Super admin access for user oversight.
adminApi.botsDesc: List, create, and configure AI bots with pagination and search. Manage bot behaviors, memory, and provider settings.
adminApi.aiProvidersDesc: Manage AI provider configurations with encrypted API keys. Configure OpenAI, Anthropic, and custom endpoints per bot.
adminApi.mcpServersDesc: Register and manage MCP server connections with paginated listing, search, and bot-server associations.
adminApi.analyticsDesc: Query analytics data across universes, worlds, rooms, and users. Aggregate counts and usage metrics.
adminApi.orbitDeepDesc: The UI layer that consumes this API. Manage your universe visually.
adminApi.scriptingApiDesc: Direct in-world logic for rooms and players. Write custom behaviors in JS/TS.
adminApi.selfHostingDesc: Deploy the full stack including the Admin API on your own infrastructure.
